description: An adjuster has determined the other party was at fault in an accident and is initiating subrogation to recover claim payments.

nodes.task_description: Review the claim file and confirm the at-fault party and their insurance carrier.

expected_outcome.value: The adjuster confirms liability rests with the other driver and identifies their insurance company.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total amount paid out on the claim (for repairs, rental, etc.).

expected_outcome.value: The adjuster calculates the total claim cost to be recovered.

nodes.task_description: Send a formal subrogation demand letter to the at-fault party's insurance carrier.

expected_outcome.value: The adjuster successfully sends the demand packet to the other insurer.
